visible_entities.action: Moving arms from a raised position down to the sides while facing forward.

visible_entities.desc: Stainless steel refrigerator with a water/ice dispenser and digital display.
Wooden kitchen cabinets with metal handles.
Hanging decorative item with red and yellow elements.

atomic_facts.fact: The person is wearing rectangular framed eyeglasses.
The person has facial hair including a beard and mustache.
The refrigerator has a vertical handle on the right door.
The t-shirt features a white graphic that appears to be a silhouette of a handgun.
There is a small yellow logo or patch on the left chest area of the black hoodie.
The refrigerator dispenser panel shows blue LED lights.

spatial: The person stands centrally in a kitchen environment. To their right is a large stainless steel refrigerator. Behind them and to the left are wooden cabinets. A decorative item hangs on the wall or cabinet door in the background on the left.

visible_entities.desc: Man with short brown hair, beard, and glasses, wearing a black zip-up hoodie over a purple t-shirt with a white graphic.
visible_entities.action: Looking at the camera, then turning head to the right with motion blur.

visible_entities.desc: Stainless steel refrigerator with a vertical handle.
Wooden kitchen cabinets.
White and black kitchen appliance (possibly a coffee grinder or blender).
visible_entities.action: Stationary on top of the refrigerator.

atomic_facts.fact: The man is wearing glasses with dark frames.
The man's t-shirt has a white graphic of a handgun on it.
The letters 'BA' are visible in white next to the handgun graphic on the t-shirt.
The man turns his head to his right, causing significant motion blur in the second frame.
A stainless steel refrigerator is visible to the man's left (viewer's right).

spatial: A man is in the foreground, positioned centrally. To his left (viewer's right) is a large stainless steel refrigerator. Wooden cabinets are visible in the background above and behind him.
